description:
## [1.0.3](https://github.com/Quantro100/Morphe-patches/releases/tag/v1.0.3) (2026-06-01)

### Patches

- Remove ads from home feed and search results
- Remove sponsored items from search
- Disable analytics and tracking
- Remove coupons popup dialogs
- Disable promotional push notifications
- Remove affiliate tracking
- Disable forced updates
- Bypass signature check for login
- Enable image saving (optional)
- Disable splash screen (optional)
